message:
feat(triage): add --weight-preset for configurable scoring emphasis

Adds WeightPreset enum with 5 named presets:
- default: Go-compatible weights (no adjustments)
- graph-heavy: boost PageRank/betweenness/time-to-impact
- priority-first: boost declared priority/urgency
- quick-wins: boost blocker-ratio/time-to-impact, lower risk
- risk-averse: boost risk/betweenness/blocker-ratio

Presets compose multiplicatively with feedback adjustments and are
renormalized to sum to 1.0. Invalid preset names emit a warning and
fall back to default.

CLI: --weight-preset <name>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -348,6 +348,10 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub recipe: Option<String>,
 
+    /// Scoring weight preset (default, graph-heavy, priority-first, quick-wins, risk-averse).
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub weight_preset: Option<String>,
+
     /// Emit a shell script for the top recommendations.
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub emit_script: bool,
